headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Ball (BALL) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Ball at around US$58.41 is offering good value right now, or if the easy money on this stock has already been made. The share price has eased 4.4% over the past week and 1.4% over the last month, yet still shows a 9.5% gain year to date and a 14.5% return over the past year. These mixed returns sit against a longer backdrop where the 3 year return is 6.7% and the 5 year return reflects a 29.6% decline, which can influence how investors think about risk.
